source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A certain mass of ideal gas is sealed within a beverage bottle. At a temperature of $t=27^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$, the pressure is $p= 1.050 \times 10^{5}\mathrm{{Pa}}$.

1. What is the gas pressure when the temperature is $t^{\prime}=37^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$?
2. Maintaining the temperature constant, the gas is compressed until its pressure is the same as in (1); what is the ratio of the new gas volume to the original volume?

image_dependency: Asset registry shows one linked image and `registry_passed=true`
But the question text is self-contained and does not explicitly reference any diagram, visual feature, or spatial relation
multi_step: The prompt has two numbered sub-questions
Part (2) depends on the pressure found in part (1), so the solution chains results across steps
Solving requires applying gas-law relations under changing temperature and then under constant temperature compression
verifiability: `answer_type` is `short_text` with two explicit numeric outputs
The quantities are standard physics values that can be checked directly from ideal gas proportionalities
`answer_present=true` and `registry_passed=true`, so the sample has usable text and answer assets for checking

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均存在，且 `registry_passed=true`，核心语义支撑完整
多步推理分和可验证性分较高，样本具有较好的入池价值
虽然存在 `requires_image_but_text_appears_self_contained` 风险标记，但这更像依赖判定上的轻微不一致，不构成核心语义缺失
